natural-gas/move/expc: LNG exports by vessel: use process=EVE (not ENG). Filter series containing MMCF for volumes.
natural-gas/stor/wkly: Weekly working gas storage; filter series for Lower 48 (R48) or regional codes.
petroleum/stoc/wstk: Weekly petroleum stocks; common series WCESTUS1 (crude), WGTSTUS1 (gasoline).
petroleum/cons/psup: Product supplied (demand proxy) by product and area.
petroleum/pnp: Refining and processing: inputs, outputs, utilization.
petroleum/move: Trade, pipelines, and movements between regions.
natural-gas/pri: Natural gas prices including Henry Hub (see pri/fut).
natural-gas/stor: Underground storage; wkly for weekly EIA storage report.
natural-gas/cons: Consumption by sector and end use.
